symbols.name: RuleSet
symbols.summary: Provides a comprehensive set of validation rules for various types of values.

syntax.content: public static class RuleSet

symbols.name: Equal(T, T, string)
symbols.summary: Validates that two values are equal. Usage: ValueRules.Equal(status, Status.Active)

syntax.content: public static IRule Equal(T value, T other, string message = null)

symbols.name: NotEqual(T, T, string)
symbols.summary: Validates that two values are not equal. Usage: ValueRules.NotEqual(status, Status.Deleted)

syntax.content: public static IRule NotEqual(T value, T other, string message = null)

symbols.name: GreaterThan(T, T, string)
symbols.summary: Validates that a value is greater than another value. Usage: ValueRules.GreaterThan(age, 18)

syntax.content: public static IRule GreaterThan(T value, T other, string message = null) where T : IComparable

symbols.name: GreaterThanOrEqual(T, T, string)
symbols.summary: Validates that a value is greater than or equal to another value. Usage: ValueRules.GreaterThanOrEqual(amount, 0)

syntax.content: public static IRule GreaterThanOrEqual(T value, T other, string message = null) where T : IComparable

symbols.name: LessThan(T, T, string)
symbols.summary: Validates that a value is less than another value. Usage: ValueRules.LessThan(temperature, 100)

syntax.content: public static IRule LessThan(T value, T other, string message = null) where T : IComparable

symbols.name: LessThanOrEqual(T, T, string)
symbols.summary: Validates that a value is less than or equal to another value. Usage: ValueRules.LessThanOrEqual(discount, 100)

syntax.content: public static IRule LessThanOrEqual(T value, T other, string message = null) where T : IComparable

symbols.name: NumericRange(T, T, T, string)
symbols.summary: Validates that a value falls within a numeric range (inclusive). Usage: ValueRules.NumericRange(rating, 1, 5)

syntax.content: public static IRule NumericRange(T value, T min, T max, string message = null) where T : IComparable

symbols.name: IsNull(T, string)
symbols.summary: Validates that a value is null. Usage: ValueRules.IsNull(optionalValue)

syntax.content: public static IRule IsNull(T value, string message = null)

symbols.name: IsNotNull(T, string)
symbols.summary: Validates that a value is not null. Usage: ValueRules.IsNotNull(requiredValue)

syntax.content: public static IRule IsNotNull(T value, string message = null)

symbols.name: IsEmpty(string, string)
symbols.summary: Validates that a collection or string is empty. Usage: ValueRules.IsEmpty(list)

syntax.content: public static IRule IsEmpty(string value, string message = null)

symbols.name: IsNotEmpty(string, string)
symbols.summary: Validates that a collection or string is not empty. Usage: ValueRules.IsNotEmpty(requiredList)

syntax.content: public static IRule IsNotEmpty(string value, string message = null)

symbols.name: IsEmpty(IEnumerable, string)
symbols.summary: Validates that a collection or string is empty. Usage: ValueRules.IsEmpty(list)

syntax.content: public static IRule IsEmpty(IEnumerable value, string message = null)

symbols.name: IsNotEmpty(IEnumerable, string)
symbols.summary: Validates that a collection or string is not empty. Usage: ValueRules.IsNotEmpty(requiredList)

syntax.content: public static IRule IsNotEmpty(IEnumerable value, string message = null)

symbols.name: Contains(string, string, StringComparison, string)
symbols.summary: Validates that a string contains a substring. Usage: ValueRules.Contains(email, "@", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)

syntax.content: public static IRule Contains(string value, string substring, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal, string message = null)

symbols.name: DoesNotContain(string, string, StringComparison, string)
symbols.summary: Validates that a string does not contain a substring. Usage: ValueRules.DoesNotContain(username, "admin", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)

syntax.content: public static IRule DoesNotContain(string value, string substring, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal, string message = null)

symbols.name: StartsWith(string, string, StringComparison, string)
symbols.summary: Validates that a string starts with a prefix. Usage: ValueRules.StartsWith(phoneNumber, "+1")

syntax.content: public static IRule StartsWith(string value, string prefix, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal, string message = null)

symbols.name: DoesNotStartWith(string, string, StringComparison)
symbols.summary: Validates that a string does not start with a prefix. Usage: ValueRules.DoesNotStartWith(email, "noreply")

syntax.content: public static IRule DoesNotStartWith(string value, string prefix, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)

symbols.name: EndsWith(string, string, StringComparison)
symbols.summary: Validates that a string ends with a suffix. Usage: ValueRules.EndsWith(email, "@company.com")

syntax.content: public static IRule EndsWith(string value, string suffix, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)

symbols.name: DoesNotEndWith(string, string, StringComparison)
symbols.summary: Validates that a string does not end with a suffix. Usage: ValueRules.DoesNotEndWith(domain, ".temp")

syntax.content: public static IRule DoesNotEndWith(string value, string suffix, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
public static IRule IsBefore(DateTime value, DateTime comparisonDate, string message = null)
public static IRule IsAfter(DateTime value, DateTime comparisonDate, string message = null)
public static IRule IsTrue(bool value, string message = null)
public static IRule IsFalse(bool value, string message = null)

symbols.name: IsInRange(DateTime, DateTime, DateTime, bool)
symbols.summary: Validates that a date falls within a specific range. Usage: ValueRules.DateRange(appointmentDate, startDate, endDate, inclusive: true)

syntax.content: public static IRule IsInRange(DateTime value, DateTime start, DateTime end, bool inclusive = true)

symbols.name: IsInRelativeRange(DateTime, DateUnit, int, DateTimeDirection)
symbols.summary: Validates that a date falls within a relative range (e.g., next 7 days). Usage: ValueRules.DateRelative(dueDate, DateRelativeUnit.Day, 7, RelativeDirection.Future)

syntax.content: public static IRule IsInRelativeRange(DateTime value, DateUnit unit, int amount, DateTimeDirection direction)

symbols.name: IsInRange(TimeOnly, TimeOnly, TimeOnly, bool)
symbols.summary: Validates that a time falls within a specific range. Usage: ValueRules.TimeRange(openingTime, TimeOnly.Parse("09:00"), TimeOnly.Parse("17:00"))

syntax.content: public static IRule IsInRange(TimeOnly value, TimeOnly start, TimeOnly end, bool inclusive = true)

symbols.name: IsInRelativeRange(TimeOnly, TimeUnit, int, DateTimeDirection)
symbols.summary: Validates that a time falls within a relative range (e.g., next 2 hours). Usage: ValueRules.TimeRelative(meetingTime, TimeRelativeUnit.Hour, 2, RelativeDirection.Future)

syntax.content: public static IRule IsInRelativeRange(TimeOnly value, TimeUnit unit, int amount, DateTimeDirection direction)

symbols.name: Any(IEnumerable, Func)
symbols.summary: Validates that any element in a collection satisfies a rule. Usage: ValueRules.Any(users, user => ValueRules.GreaterThan(user.Age, 18))

syntax.content: public static IRule Any(IEnumerable collection, Func ruleFactory)

symbols.name: All(IEnumerable, Func)
symbols.summary: Validates that all elements in a collection satisfy a rule. Usage: ValueRules.All(orderItems, item => ValueRules.GreaterThan(item.Quantity, 0))

syntax.content: public static IRule All(IEnumerable collection, Func ruleFactory)

symbols.name: None(IEnumerable, Func)
symbols.summary: Validates that no element in a collection satisfies a rule. Usage: ValueRules.None(products, product => ValueRules.Equal(product.Status, Status.Discontinued))

syntax.content: public static IRule None(IEnumerable collection, Func ruleFactory)

symbols.name: In(T, IEnumerable)
symbols.summary: Validates that a value exists in a collection. Usage: ValueRules.In(status, new[] { Status.Active, Status.Pending })

syntax.content: public static IRule In(T value, IEnumerable allowedValues)

symbols.name: NotIn(T, IEnumerable)
symbols.summary: Validates that a value does not exist in a collection. Usage: ValueRules.NotIn(username, reservedUsernames)

syntax.content: public static IRule NotIn(T value, IEnumerable disallowedValues)

symbols.name: FullTextSearch(string, string, StringComparison)
symbols.summary: Validates text against a full-text search query. Usage: ValueRules.FullTextSearch(document.Content, "important meeting", searchFields)

syntax.content: public static IRule FullTextSearch(string text, string searchTerm, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)

symbols.name: IsValidEmail(string, string)
symbols.summary: Validates that a string is a valid email address. Usage: ValueRules.IsEmail("test@example.com")

syntax.content: public static IRule IsValidEmail(string value, string message = null)

symbols.name: HasValues(TEnum, IEnumerable)
symbols.summary: Validates that an enum value is one of the allowed values. Usage: ValueRules.EnumValues(status, new[] { Status.Active, Status.Pending })

syntax.content: public static IRule HasValues(TEnum value, IEnumerable allowedValues) where TEnum : struct, Enum

symbols.name: MatchesPattern(string, string)
symbols.summary: Validates that a value matches a regular expression pattern. Usage: ValueRules.Pattern(email, @"^[^@\s]+@[^@\s]+\.[^@\s]+$")

syntax.content: public static IRule MatchesPattern(string value, string pattern)

symbols.name: HasStringLength(string, int, int)
symbols.summary: Validates that a string has a specific length range. Usage: ValueRules.StringLength(password, 8, 20)

syntax.content: public static IRule HasStringLength(string value, int minLength, int maxLength)

symbols.name: HasCollectionSize(IEnumerable, int, int)
symbols.summary: Validates that a collection has a specific size range. Usage: ValueRules.CollectionSize(items, 1, 10)

syntax.content: public static IRule HasCollectionSize(IEnumerable collection, int minSize, int maxSize)

symbols.name: TextIn(string, IEnumerable, StringComparison)
symbols.summary: Validates text against a list of allowed words. Usage: ValueRules.TextIn(category, new[] { "Electronics", "Books", "Clothing" })

syntax.content: public static IRule TextIn(string value, IEnumerable allowedValues, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)

symbols.name: TextNotIn(string, IEnumerable, StringComparison)
symbols.summary: Validates text against a list of disallowed words. Usage: ValueRules.TextNotIn(username, reservedUsernames)

syntax.content: public static IRule TextNotIn(string value, IEnumerable disallowedValues, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)

symbols.name: NumericIn(T, IEnumerable)
symbols.summary: Validates that a numeric value is in a list of allowed values. Usage: ValueRules.NumericIn(quantity, new[] { 1, 5, 10 })

syntax.content: public static IRule NumericIn(T value, IEnumerable allowedValues) where T : IComparable

symbols.name: NumericNotIn(T, IEnumerable)
symbols.summary: Validates that a numeric value is not in a list of disallowed values. Usage: ValueRules.NumericNotIn(quantity, new[] { 0, -1 })

syntax.content: public static IRule NumericNotIn(T value, IEnumerable disallowedValues) where T : IComparable
